# SL-HEAD-005: title-h1-token-mismatch

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate-rule-docs.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->

## Summary

Title and H1 have low deterministic token overlap where policy expects
alignment.

## Metadata

- Category: Headings and structure (headings-structure)
- Default severity: info
- Confidence: heuristic
- Scope: page
- Provider scope: core
- Version: 1.0.0

## Evidence Sources

- rendered-dom

## Required Evidence

- title-value
- h1-value
- policy-threshold

## When This Triggers

Compare normalized title and H1 token sets against configured overlap guidance.

## False Positives

This rule is heuristic. Treat the diagnostic as a review prompt and use DSL
severity overrides or suppressions when project policy intentionally differs.

## How To Fix

Review title and H1 alignment for the route intent.

- fixtures/headings/title-h1-token-mismatch

Fixed direction:

- Review title and H1 alignment for the route intent.
